text.value: @concat('UPDATE [dbo].[tbl_integration_delivery_group] SET [reconciliation_status] = ''Pending'', [reconciliation_report_name] = ''', pipeline().parameters.p_bip_report_name, ''', [updated_at_utc] = SYSUTCDATETIME() WHERE [batch_id] = TRY_CONVERT(uniqueidentifier, ''', pipeline().parameters.p_batch_id, '''); UPDATE [dbo].[tbl_integration_document_status] SET [reconciliation_status] = ''Pending'', [last_updated_at_utc] = SYSUTCDATETIME() WHERE [batch_id] = TRY_CONVERT(uniqueidentifier, ''', pipeline().parameters.p_batch_id, ''') AND [document_status] IN (''Delivered To Interface'', ''Imported To AP'');')

folder.name: df_softco_to_fusion_ap_invoice_inbound_integration (IN-04)/stage 2 - to be triggered every X hours
